claim_audit_results.claim_summary: Consistency log present, non-empty, and free of inconsistency_flagged or unresolved entries
claim_audit_results.flag_reason: CC-06 has status='inconsistency_flagged': (1) OBJ-4 multi-component metric partial loss in impact_section.json — accuracy threshold ('within 10% of specialist clinician performance') and domain scope ('spanning 5 diagnostic domains') omitted; only case count retained. (2) OBJ-8 KPI targets (≥30 tools/APIs, ≥95% invocation success, ≤5s recovery, 100% provenance traces) entirely absent from impact section despite WP2/ATU cited for EO-01. Both gaps require revision of impact_section.json before finalization.

claim_audit_results.source_ref: docs/tier5_deliverables/assembled_drafts/part_b_assembled_draft.json — traceability_footer.primary_sources: 7 entries spanning Tier 3 and Tier 4 artifacts; derivation_note present
claim_audit_results.flag_reason: Informational: assembled draft declares no_unsupported_claims_declaration=false, correctly reflecting the CC-06 cross-section inconsistency at assembly level, while all three individual section declarations are true. Divergence is accurate. Traceability coverage is present and valid; unresolved status does not apply per spec rule ('Unresolved only if no traceability coverage exists').
